---
title: "Water Quality Dashboard"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: cosmo
    source_code: embed
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(leaflet)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(dataRetrieval)
library(DT)
library(lubridate)

# Source the data fetching script
source("scripts/fetch_data.R")

# Fetch data (using Arizona as example, 2023-present)
wq_list <- fetch_usgs_wq_data(state_cd = "AZ", 
                              start_date = "2023-01-01",
                              parameter_codes = c("00010", "00300", "00400"))

wq_data <- wq_list$data
sites <- wq_list$sites

# Clean and prepare data
wq_clean <- wq_data %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(sample_dt),
         year = year(date),
         month = month(date, label = TRUE)) %>%
  select(site_no, station_nm, date, year, month,
         dec_lat_va, dec_long_va, parm_cd, result_va) %>%
  filter(!is.na(result_va))

# Add parameter names
param_names <- data.frame(
  parm_cd = c("00010", "00300", "00400"),
  parameter = c("Temperature (°C)", "Dissolved Oxygen (mg/L)", "pH")
)

wq_clean <- left_join(wq_clean, param_names, by = "parm_cd")
```

Column {data-width=350}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Map of Monitoring Sites
```{r}
# Create color palette for parameters
pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c"),
  domain = wq_clean$parameter
)

# Get unique sites with their info
site_summary <- wq_clean %>%
  group_by(site_no, station_nm, dec_lat_va, dec_long_va) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    parameters = paste(unique(parameter), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Create leaflet map
leaflet(site_summary) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    lng = ~dec_long_va,
    lat = ~dec_lat_va,
    radius = 6,
    color = "#3d4f3a",
    fillColor = "#6b8f5e",
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>", station_nm, "</b><br/>",
      "Site ID: ", site_no, "<br/>",
      "Samples: ", n_samples, "<br/>",
      "Parameters: ", parameters
    )
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    title = "Monitoring Sites",
    labels = paste0(nrow(site_summary), " sites"),
    colors = "#6b8f5e"
  )
```

### Summary Statistics
```{r}
summary_stats <- wq_clean %>%
  group_by(parameter) %>%
  summarise(
    `Sample Count` = n(),
    `Mean` = round(mean(result_va, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    `Median` = round(median(result_va, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    `Min` = round(min(result_va, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    `Max` = round(max(result_va, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

datatable(summary_stats, 
          options = list(pageLength = 5, dom = 't'),
          rownames = FALSE)
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Water Quality Trends Over Time
```{r}
plot_ly(wq_clean, x = ~date, y = ~result_va, color = ~parameter,
        type = 'scatter', mode = 'markers',
        marker = list(size = 8, opacity = 0.6),
        hoverinfo = 'text',
        text = ~paste0(
          parameter, "<br>",
          "Value: ", round(result_va, 2), "<br>",
          "Site: ", station_nm, "<br>",
          "Date: ", date
        )) %>%
  layout(
    title = "Water Quality Parameters by Date",
    xaxis = list(title = "Date"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Measurement Value"),
    hovermode = 'closest',
    legend = list(orientation = 'h', y = -0.2)
  )
```

### Distribution by Parameter
```{r}
plot_ly(wq_clean, y = ~result_va, color = ~parameter, type = "box") %>%
  layout(
    title = "Distribution of Water Quality Parameters",
    yaxis = list(title = "Measurement Value"),
    xaxis = list(title = ""),
    showlegend = FALSE
  )
```
